problem: What enzyme or organism efficiently degrades all plastic types at scale?
hypothesis: The key to What enzyme or organism efficiently degrades all plastic types at scale? is Aerogel porosity for thermal/acoustic insulation — specifically Aerogel porosity for — which would help 8,000,000,000 people affected.

experiment.protocol: Mechanical testing (tensile, fatigue) with 36 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.
